code_generation.correctness: Does the code run without errors and solve the problem?
code_generation.efficiency: Is the solution optimized for time/space complexity?
code_generation.style: Does it follow language idioms and formatting standards?
code_generation.security: Are there any vulnerabilities (e.g., SQLi, XSS)?
code_generation.documentation: Are functions and complex logic explained?

creative_writing.creativity: Is the content original and engaging?
creative_writing.tone: Does it match the requested persona/style?
creative_writing.clarity: Is the message easy to understand?
creative_writing.structure: Is the flow logical and well-organized?

data_extraction.format: Is the output in the requested format (JSON/CSV)?

general.instruction_following: Did the agent follow all constraints?
general.hallucination: Is the information factual and grounded?
